# drawsBeforeStartLocation

**Type Property**

The fill should extend beyond the starting location. The color that extends beyond the starting point is the solid color defined by the [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGGradient] object to be at location 0.

## Declaration

```swift
static var drawsBeforeStartLocation: CGGradientDrawingOptions { get }
```

## Constants

- **drawsAfterEndLocation**: The fill should extend beyond the ending location. The color that extends beyond the ending point is the solid color defined by the [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGGradient] object to be at location 1.
